basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Kurukshetra has released the official Counsellor Recruitment 2026 notification under Advertisement No. 14/2026 at https://nitkkr.ac.in/. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the NIT Kurukshetra Counsellor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age limit of 57 years and holding a Master's Degree in Clinical Psychology with First Class, along with three years of relevant experience, can participate in the walk-in interview on 15 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Clinical Psychology with first class, along with three years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Clinical Psychology with first class, along with three years of relevant experience.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Kurukshetra Counsellor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Counsellor post at NIT Kurukshetra is scheduled for 15 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counsellor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Clinical Psychology with first class, along with at least three years of relevant experience to be eligible for the Counsellor post.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Counsellor position announced by NIT Kurukshetra.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Counsellor post is 57 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Counsellor recruitment drive at NIT Kurukshetra.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Counsellor post is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counsellor role will be based on a Walk-in Interview conducted by NIT Kurukshetra.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Kurukshetra located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology, Kurukshetra is located in Kurukshetra, Haryana, with the pincode 136119.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment for the Counsellor post at NIT Kurukshetra is on a contract basis.
